<big><center>'''''This may not be the Gunpla you're looking for. Are you looking for the [[MG ASW-G-08 Gundam Barbatos Lupus|Master Grade kit]] instead?'''''</center></big>

{{Plamo_Infobox|image = IBO FM Barbatos Lupus Box.jpg|Classification = 1/100 IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS|Lineup no. = 01|Scale = 1/100|Franchise = Mobile Suit Gundam IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS|Release Date = November 19, 2016|Price = ¥3,000 {{refyentax}}|JAN/ISBN = 4549660119517|Need glue? = No|Materials = PS,PE|Run = Standard|Need paint? = |name=1/100 (Full Mechanics) ASW-G-08 Gundam Barbatos Lupus|Japanese Name=フルメカニクス ガンダムバルバトスルプス|Model of=ASW-G-08 Gundam Barbatos Lupus}}The [[1/100 IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS]] (NG IBO) '''ASW-G-08 Gundam Barbatos Lupus''' is a 1/100 Scale kit released in 2016.
==Includes==
*Gundam Barbatos Lupus
**Manipulators (1 pair for each)
***General weapon-holding
***Open-palm
*Sword Mace
*x2 200mm Guns
*x2 Sub-arm units

==Kit Features & Gimmicks==

=== Articulation ===

*The head can swivel on a ball-and-socket neck joint.
*The torso can tilt forwards, or sideways (with functioning pistons).
*The arms can...
**Swivel on a ball-and-socket joint.
**Raise horizontally.
*The upper arms can rotate.
*Elbow joints can be bent up to 120 degrees.
*The manipulators can swivel on a ball-and-socket joint.
*The waist can rotate, though it can be partially hindered by parts of the skirt armor.
* The hip joint axis can swing frontward/backwards on one side.
* The upper thigh joints can swing frontwards (and backwards in some extent) on a peg-and-socket joint, raise horizontally, and/or rotate on each piece.
**Front and side skirt armors can lift up to provide clearance.
*The knees are double-jointed.
*Ankle joints can pivot and/or slightly tilt.

=== Weapons/Other Gimmicks ===
*Armor can be attached or removed from the Gundam Frame. (Some parts required swapping.)
*The hands are swappable.
*Any of the weapons can be wielded by the default weapon-holding hands.
**The weapon handles/hilts and the palms feature molded tabs and tab holes for increased gripping stability.
*Twin 120mm guns attach to the forearms.
**Each Gun can rotate frontwards.
*Sword Mace can be mount onto the backpack unit via an adapter.
*Sub-arm parts can be attached to the backpack unit via partsforming for additional support when handling weapons.
*Gundam Barbatos Lupus can mount onto [[Action Base]]s 1 or 4 via an adapter.
**If one is inclined, the adapter's panels can be shortened by trimming the pieces off. (Note: may be unstable if trimmed too much.)

==Tips and Tricks ==
* For better results, some or most of the details are needed to be applied with Gundam Markers or Mr. Color paints.
* Topcoat (Mr. Hobby recommended) can be used to protect applied stickers and if any, marking decals and painted details.
